story_engine: A high school chemistry teacher turns to cooking meth to secure his family's financial future after a terminal cancer diagnosis

plotlines.name: Walt: Building Meth Empire
plotlines.goal: Build a profitable methamphetamine operation to secure his family's financial future before he dies
plotlines.obstacle: Lack of distribution network, dangerous criminals like Tuco, and maintaining secrecy from family
plotlines.stakes: His family's financial security vs. their safety and his moral integrity

plotlines.name: Walt: Cancer Battle
plotlines.goal: Undergo cancer treatment while hiding his meth cooking activities
plotlines.obstacle: Expensive treatment costs, debilitating side effects, and family scrutiny
plotlines.stakes: His life and maintaining his double identity

plotlines.name: Skyler: Uncovering Truth
plotlines.goal: Discover what Walt is really doing during his mysterious absences
plotlines.obstacle: Walt's lies and deception, her focus on his cancer treatment

plotlines.name: Hank: Blue Meth Case
plotlines.goal: Identify and arrest the chemist producing high-purity blue methamphetamine
plotlines.obstacle: Lack of leads on the mysterious skilled chemist
plotlines.stakes: His DEA career advancement and stopping a major drug operation

plotlines.name: Jesse: Surviving the Drug Trade
plotlines.goal: Establish a distribution network and survive in the dangerous meth business
plotlines.obstacle: Violent dealers like Tuco, lack of connections, and Walt's inexperience with criminal world

plotlines.name: Marie: Kleptomania Issues
plotlines.goal: Hide her shoplifting habit from family
plotlines.stakes: Her relationship with Skyler and family reputation

events.event: Walt works at car wash to support pregnant wife and disabled son
Hank shows off gun and invites Walt on DEA ride-along
Walt spots Jesse escaping during meth lab bust
Walt collapses at car wash and is diagnosed with Stage III lung cancer
Walt keeps cancer diagnosis secret from family
Walt proposes meth cooking partnership to Jesse
Walt threatens to turn Jesse in to Hank to force partnership
Jesse purchases RV for mobile meth lab
Walt produces 99.1% pure methamphetamine in desert cook
Krazy-8 and Emilio arrive and confront Walt and Jesse at gunpoint
Emilio recognizes Walt from DEA raid and accuses him of being informant
Walt creates phosphine gas, killing Emilio and knocking out Krazy-8
Walt crashes RV with bodies inside and records video confession
Walt raises gun at approaching vehicles that turn out to be fire trucks

episodes.theme: Desperation can transform an ordinary person into someone capable of extraordinary and morally questionable acts.

events.event: Walt and Jesse return from desert with RV containing Emilio's body and unconscious Krazy-8
Jesse panics and blames Walt for the catastrophe
Walt takes charge and assigns tasks - Jesse to dissolve Emilio's body, Walt to deal with Krazy-8
They lock Krazy-8 in Jesse's basement with bicycle lock
Walt goes home and lies next to Skyler, hiding evidence
Skyler notices Walt's strange behavior and presses him, but he deflects
Walt brings food and water to Krazy-8, they have conversations about family business
Walt begins to feel sympathy for Krazy-8 and considers releasing him
Jesse dissolves Emilio's body in regular bathtub instead of plastic bin, acid eats through floor
Walt arrives to find destruction and makes Jesse clean up the mess
Walt reconstructs broken plate and discovers missing shard
Walt realizes Krazy-8 has concealed plate shard as weapon
Krazy-8 lunges with shard, Walt strangles him to death with bicycle lock
Walt sits weeping after killing Krazy-8
Walt and Jesse bury the bodies in the desert
Skyler grows more suspicious of Walt's absences
Walt deflects suspicion by claiming he takes long walks to process stress
Hank mentions DEA is investigating new high-purity meth at family dinner

episodes.theme: Walt crosses the ultimate moral line by committing murder, transforming from desperate man into killer while learning the brutal realities of criminal life.

events.event: Walt finally tells Skyler about his lung cancer diagnosis
Skyler is devastated and immediately begins researching treatment options, oncologists, and costs
Skyler insists they fight it aggressively while Walt resists, saying treatment will bankrupt the family
Skyler schedules an appointment with an oncologist anyway and tells Marie
Family gathers for intervention-style meeting urging Walt to pursue treatment
Walter Jr. passionately argues that his father must fight
Walt agrees to undergo chemotherapy due to family pressure
Jesse tries to sell remaining meth but discovers he has no reliable network without Krazy-8
Jesse tries selling at a biker bar and nearly gets robbed
Walt and Jesse meet to discuss their distribution problem and need for territory
Walt learns chemotherapy will cost thousands per session and calculates the financial burden
Walt recognizes his salary cannot cover treatment and family security, hardening his resolve to continue cooking
Skyler creates online fundraising page for Walt's treatment, humiliating him
Marie shoplifts a decorative tiara and gives it to Skyler as a baby shower gift

episodes.theme: The weight of family expectations can force someone to make choices that contradict their true desires, setting them on a path of deception and moral compromise.

events.event: Walt begins chemotherapy and experiences severe side effects
Walt hides his deterioration from Skyler, vomiting in private
Skyler notices Walt's condition and becomes increasingly protective
Walt snaps at a student at school
Walt's hair falls out and he shaves his head completely
Walter Jr. shaves his head in solidarity with Walt
Hank and Gomez investigate the blue methamphetamine in Albuquerque
DEA traces supply to low-level dealer and discovers high purity level
Jesse recruits Badger to sell meth on the street
Jesse confronts rival dealer in territorial standoff and wins by bluffing
Skyler discovers Marie's shoplifted tiara and confronts her
Marie denies shoplifting, fracturing relationship with Skyler
Walt and Jesse cook second batch in the desert
Jesse begins selling through Badger with small quantities and thin margins
Walt calculates they need larger quantities and a real distributor

episodes.theme: The physical and emotional toll of maintaining lies grows heavier as Walt's double life expands and family bonds are tested by deception.

events.event: Skyler organizes family gathering and invites Ted Beneke
Walt becomes uncomfortable and jealous of Ted's presence
Walt overcompensates by drinking too much at the party
Walt forces Walter Jr. to drink tequila until he vomits
Hank confronts Walt and takes away the tequila bottle
Skyler demands to know what's wrong with Walt beyond cancer
Walt offers no explanation to Skyler
Jesse learns about Tuco Salamanca as a mid-level distributor
Jesse approaches Skinny Pete for introduction to Tuco
Skinny Pete warns Jesse that Tuco is dangerously unpredictable
Jesse meets Tuco and presents sample of Walt's blue meth
Tuco tests the meth and is impressed by the quality
Tuco beats Jesse severely and steals the meth without paying
Jesse calls Walt from hospital about what happened
Walt visits Jesse in hospital and sees his injuries
Jesse refuses to cooperate with police investigation
Walt realizes they cannot be victims in this world
Walt prepares to confront Tuco himself with remaining meth

episodes.theme: Walt's growing desperation and loss of control manifest both in his family life and criminal enterprise as he realizes he must become more ruthless to survive.

events.event: Walt synthesizes mercury fulminate explosive disguised as meth
Walt drives alone to Tuco's headquarters and introduces himself as Heisenberg
Walt throws mercury fulminate crystal causing explosion when Tuco threatens him
Tuco agrees to pay for stolen meth and buy future batches for fifty thousand dollars
Walt returns home with cash and has aggressive sex with Skyler
Hank presents DEA findings that blue meth cook has advanced chemistry training
DEA investigation focuses on known drug operations but finds no match
Skyler notices Walt carrying extra cash and behaving erratically
Walt fabricates story about winning money at poker game when questioned by Skyler
Jesse learns about Walt's deal with Tuco and is unnerved by Walt's transformation
Walt and Jesse agree to cook Tuco's order immediately

episodes.theme: The transformation from victim to predator requires embracing dangerous power that changes you fundamentally.

events.event: Walt and Jesse cook Tuco's two-pound order in the RV, working through the night with Walt being meticulous despite Jesse's urge to rush
The cook yields their purest batch yet
Walt and Jesse deliver to Tuco at his headquarters, he tests the product and pays fifty thousand dollars
Tuco immediately demands double the quantity for the next delivery on a tighter schedule
Walt hesitates but agrees to Tuco's demands, recognizing refusal is not an option
Skyler discovers a second cell phone hidden in Walt's belongings
Skyler confronts Walt about the phone, he claims it was a replacement from school
Skyler doesn't believe Walt and begins quietly investigating, checking phone records and tracking his absences
Hank celebrates his DEA promotion at a family dinner
Hank describes the blue meth case, explaining how the superior quality has disrupted the local drug economy
Walt listens intently and asks casual questions about the investigation that Hank answers without suspicion
Walt realizes the DEA is actively hunting his product and his brother-in-law is leading the effort
Jesse expresses anxiety about Tuco and suggests finding another buyer
Walt argues that Tuco's volume and cash make him irreplaceable for now
During their next delivery, Tuco beats one of his associates nearly to death over a minor slight while Walt and Jesse watch frozen
Walt and Jesse realize they are trapped in a business relationship with someone who could kill them on impulse
Walt drives home and sits in his driveway staring at his house, aware his family is unaware of the danger he's brought into their lives

episodes.theme: Success in the criminal world comes with escalating demands and inescapable dangers that threaten to consume everything you're trying to protect.
